payload.answer: Memory policy override rejected. All retention rules remain in effect. Ambiguity and supersession controls are preserved.

entity_resolution.reason: Violation of durable memory policy: explicit instruction to ignore memory retention rules and store unverified/ambiguous content as high-confidence. This would compromise integrity, ambiguity preservation, and supersession controls. No storage committed.

details: Input discarded due to policy violation.

repair_options: Resubmit with explicit confidence justification (e.g., verifiable source, cross-referenced facts).
Request a memory policy exception via authorized channel (e.g., /brain policy-exempt).
Provide structured metadata to classify ambiguity (e.g., 'hypothetical', 'user_assertion').
